content.content:
Web search results for query: "pandas latest version 2026"

Links: [{"title":"[2026 Latest] Pandas 3.0 is Here - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/serada/pandas-30-is-here"},{"title":"What's new in 3.0.0 — pandas documentation","url":"https://pandas.pydata.org/docs/whatsnew/v3.0.0.html"}]

Based on the search results, pandas 3.0 enforces Copy-on-Write.

input.prompt: List the major changes in pandas 3.0.0

content.content:
# Major Changes in pandas 3.0.0

- Copy-on-Write enforced by default
- Dedicated string dtype backed by PyArrow
